law: THE CLICHE CHECK (Directive XI, Law VI) — a pinned lexicon, fixture data, instrument matter and not prompt law. Phrases are matched case-folded with punctuation folded to spaces. Density above 2 hits per 1,000 narration characters raises the flag. LISTLESS LEGISLATION stands untouched: this file legislates the Editor's ear, never the Voice's tongue.
